_description: Strategy archetypes group related strategies by trade logic. The decision engine selects the right archetype based on market regime + session + ICT signals, then evaluates specific strategies within that archetype.

REVERSAL.description: Fade exhausted moves after liquidity is taken. Buy below lows, sell above highs.
REVERSAL.when_to_use: After liquidity sweep confirmed + CHoCH/MSS on LTF + price in discount/premium zone

strategies.name: ICT Reversal (Liquidity Sweep + CHoCH)
strategies.entry: Enter at breaker block or OB after CHoCH confirms on LTF
strategies.target: Next HTF liquidity level (prior swing high/low)

strategies.name: AMD Distribution Phase
strategies.entry: Retrace into FVG left by displacement candle
strategies.target: Partial at swing levels, trail remainder

strategies.name: Mean Reversion (Extreme Displacement)
strategies.entry: After structure break confirms reversal (break above prior bar high for longs)
strategies.stop: Below capitulation low (longs) / above parabolic high (shorts)

strategies.name: Failed Auction (Auction Market Theory)
triggers: Price moves aggressively to one side
strategies.entry: When opposing side takes clear control (absorption confirmed)
strategies.target: Return to fair value / prior balance area

strategies.name: Liquidity Grab Reversal
triggers: Key high/low that price respected and moved away from
Price returns and trades through the level
strategies.entry: After liquidity is taken and price reclaims the level
strategies.stop: Below swept low (longs) / above swept high (shorts)

CONTINUATION.description: Join existing trend after healthy pullback. Trade with structure, not against it.
CONTINUATION.when_to_use: Clear BOS confirmed + pullback to discount (longs) or premium (shorts) + FVG/OB behind price

strategies.name: Structure + OTE Pullback
strategies.entry: At breaker block after MSB on LTF, inside discount zone (longs) or premium zone (shorts)
strategies.stop: Below swept lows (longs) / above swept highs (shorts)
strategies.target: Next HTF external liquidity (prior swing high/low)

strategies.name: PO3, OTE + ADR (Market Maker Model)
triggers: Price at PD Array (PDH/PDL, FVG, OB, weekly levels)
Displacement candle with body close past level
strategies.entry: Limit order at OTE zone (0.62 or 0.705 Fibonacci level preferred)
strategies.stop: At 1.0 Fibonacci level (swing extreme) or 0.90 for tighter risk
strategies.target: 0.0 Fibonacci level, then trail if momentum continues
strategies.time_filter: London Open (2-5am ET) or NY Open (7-10am ET)
strategies.be_rule: Move to breakeven when price closes past 0.20 Fibonacci level

strategies.name: Trendline Bounce
strategies.entry: At trendline touch with confirmation candle

strategies.name: Break & Retest
triggers: Price pulls back to retest the level
Confirmation candle (wick into level, close in trade direction)
strategies.entry: After confirmation candle at retest zone
strategies.stop: Beyond invalidation point (below level for longs)
strategies.target: TP1 at prior high/low, then trail

LIQUIDITY.description: Trade where institutional orders cluster. Enter after liquidity events, target liquidity pools.
LIQUIDITY.when_to_use: Clear liquidity levels identified + sweep event occurs + LTF confirms direction

strategies.name: Liquidity Run (Displacement + Draw)
strategies.entry: At FVG during retracement toward draw-on-liquidity

strategies.name: Intraday Liquidity & Volatility Model
triggers: PDH/PDL or Asian/London high/low swept during NY
LTF confirms via FVG/MSS/Turtle Soup/Breaker Block
strategies.entry: After liquidity raid + LTF confirmation between 9:30-11:30 ET
strategies.stop: Above swept high (shorts) / below swept low (longs)
strategies.target: Opposite session liquidity zones or HTF FVGs

strategies.name: Low Volume Node
triggers: Order flow confirms defender at level
strategies.entry: At LVN with order flow confirmation
strategies.stop: Beyond the LVN or recent swing

TIMING.description: Time-specific setups that only work in narrow windows. These are precision entries.
TIMING.when_to_use: When the exact time window is active AND the pattern forms

strategies.name: Trident / Unique High RR (London Kill Zone)
triggers: Small doji candle wicks into FVG 50%
Confirmation candle closes below doji high
EMA stack (5/9/13/21) aligned in direction + price relative to 200 EMA
strategies.entry: On confirmation candle close or limit at FVG 50%
strategies.stop: Below FVG candle low (standard) or no hard stop for Gold
strategies.target: Ride trend via daily chart structure, exit when EMAs reverse
strategies.notes: Very selective — may only appear a few times per year per pair. But when it hits, massive R:R.

strategies.name: SMT Divergence + PO3 (10 AM Manipulation)
triggers: SMT divergence (NQ vs ES, or BTC vs ETH)
strategies.entry: Sell stop below inversion zone (shorts) or buy stop above (longs)
strategies.be_rule: Move to breakeven once hourly candle confirms direction

confluence_filters._description: These are NOT standalone strategies. They modify confidence scores of archetype strategies.

filters.name: Volume Profile Edge Alignment
filters.condition: Price at HVA/LVA boundary with signal candle
filters.effect: +5 to ICT score when aligned, -5 when price is mid-HVA

filters.name: EMA Stack Confirmation
filters.condition: 5/9/13/21 EMAs stacked in trade direction + price above/below 200 EMA
filters.effect: +8 to ICT score when fully aligned, 0 when mixed, -5 when opposing

filters.name: Mean Reversion Warning
filters.condition: Price >2 standard deviations from 20 EMA + 3+ consecutive same-direction candles
filters.effect: -10 to continuation strategies, +10 to reversal strategies. If >3 SD, flag as 'extreme — reversal only'.

filters.name: Backtest Performance Multiplier
filters.condition: MT5 Sharpe ratio for this symbol's optimal EA config

filters.name: Regime-Strategy Match
filters.condition: Current regime matches strategy archetype's regime_fit
filters.effect: +5 when matched, -8 when mismatched (e.g., reversal strategy in strong trend)

filters.name: ADR Exhaustion Check
filters.condition: Price has moved >80% of Average Daily Range
filters.effect: -10 to continuation strategies targeting further extension. +5 to reversal strategies.

filters.name: Bollinger Band Regime Classification
filters.condition: BB(20,3SD) band width classifies market: contracting=consolidation, expanding=trend, contracting-after-peak=mean-reversion
filters.effect: Consolidation: favor range strategies, avoid breakout. Expansion: favor continuation, avoid reversal. Mean-reversion: favor reversal at 30% Fib of BB peak-to-peak.

filters.name: VIX/ES Divergence (Index Only)
filters.condition: ES breaks PDL + VIX reaches PDH = confirmed institutional hedging. ES breaks PDL but NQ holds + VIX weak = false breakdown.
filters.effect: Confirmed: +8 to short signals on indices. False: -10 to short signals (likely reversal). 1% rule: both ES and VIX up 1%+ = fragile strength, avoid longs at resistance.

filters.name: Consecutive Candle / First Red Day Filter
filters.condition: 3+ consecutive same-direction candles with expanding range and volume = potential exhaustion
filters.effect: +5 to reversal strategies (First Red Day pattern). -5 to continuation entries on the last candle of a streak. If parabolic acceleration detected: flag as reversal-only.

filters.name: Universal Three-Step Validation
filters.condition: Check if current signal follows the three-step pattern: 1) Liquidity Catalyst (sweep, break, shift), 2) Displacement (decisive confirming move), 3) Retracement (pullback to entry zone)
filters.effect: +10 if all 3 steps confirmed. -5 if entering on step 1 or 2 (too early, no retracement yet). 'No Liquidity Catalyst = No Trade' applies as hard filter.

filters.name: Dual Timeframe MA Alignment
filters.condition: Price above/below 21+50 EMA on BOTH daily and intraday timeframe in trade direction
filters.effect: +6 when fully aligned on both TFs. -4 when conflicting (daily bullish but intraday below MAs).

filters.name: Pattern Degradation Filter
filters.condition: Track consecutive similar setups on same symbol. 1st-2nd occurrence = strongest. 3rd = moderate. 4th+ = weakening.
